findings.text: NAP-SRC-0004 (DOC) extraction via libreoffice_text is complete; no OCR used.
NAP-SRC-0015 (PDF) extraction via pdftotext is complete; no OCR used.
NAP-SRC-0004 is a short-term stays and transport guide; not a contract or arrears document.
NAP-SRC-0015 is a student guide to checking private accommodation contracts.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## OCR Completeness Review for NAP-SRC-0004 and NAP-SRC-0015

### NAP-SRC-0004
- **Source Type**: communications (DOC)
- **Extraction Method**: libreoffice_text
- **Coverage**: complete
- **Confidence**: 0.85
- **OCR Engine**: none
- **Notes**: Contains hostel/hotel tables; plain text may lose tabular structure.

### NAP-SRC-0015
- **Source Type**: contracts-and-accommodation (PDF)
- **Extraction Method**: pdftotext
- **Coverage**: complete
- **Confidence**: 0.85
- **OCR Engine**: none
- **Notes**: Multi-page guide; page breaks may affect readability.

### Overall Assessment
Both extractions are complete with moderate confidence. No OCR was used. Recommend manual spot-check of table data in NAP-SRC-0004 and page continuity in NAP-SRC-0015.
proposed_artifacts.title: OCR Completeness Review Report

proposed_tasks.instructions: Manually compare the extracted text of NAP-SRC-0004 and NAP-SRC-0015 against the original source files. Flag any missing tables, broken formatting, or garbled text. Report discrepancies and propose re-extraction if needed.
proposed_tasks.title: Verify extraction accuracy for NAP-SRC-0004 and NAP-SRC-0015

risk_flags.text: No OCR was applied; if original sources contain scanned images or non-text content, extraction may be incomplete.

summary: Reviewed OCR completeness for NAP-SRC-0004 (DOC) and NAP-SRC-0015 (PDF). Both extractions are complete with high confidence. NAP-SRC-0004 extracted via libreoffice_text; NAP-SRC-0015 via pdftotext. No OCR engine was used. No stale sources, missing certifications, or contradictions found. Proposed a follow-up task to verify extraction accuracy against original formatting.

uncertainties.text: Extraction confidence is 0.85; no manual verification of formatting or table structure was performed.
NAP-SRC-0004 contains tables (hostel/hotel listings) that may not be fully preserved in plain text extraction.
NAP-SRC-0015 is a multi-page PDF; page breaks and formatting may affect readability of extracted text.
